captureStep.text:
"[Match [0/9]: /* abc */, Match [16/25]: /* abc */]
[Match [4/5]: b, Match [20/21]: b]
/* aXYZc */ "abc" /* aXYZc */
"

"input: , matches: [x] -> find: null
input: abcdefg, matches: [] -> find: Match [0/0]: 
input: abcdefg, matches: [a] -> find: Match [0/1]: a
input: abcdefg, matches: [x] -> find: null
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd] -> find: Match [1/4]: bcd
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd, bcdx] -> find: Match [1/4]: bcd
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd, bcde] -> find: Match [1/5]: bcde
input: abcdefg, matches: [def, defgh] -> find: Match [3/6]: def
"

"input: , matches: [x] -> find: null
input: abcdefg, matches: [] -> find: Match [0/0]: 
input: abcdefg, matches: [a] -> find: Match [0/1]: a
input: abcdefg, matches: [x] -> find: null
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd] -> find: Match [1/4]: bcd
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd, bcdx] -> find: Match [1/4]: bcd
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd, bcde] -> find: Match [1/5]: bcde
input: abcdefg, matches: [def, defgh] -> find: Match [3/6]: def
"

"
null
 -> Match [0/0]: 

a
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=a, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=1]

a -> Match [0/1]: a

a
b
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=, allChildChars=[97, 98], end=false, minLen=1]
	MatchNode [matchChar=97 a, startString=null, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=1]
	MatchNode [matchChar=98 b, startString=null, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=1]

a -> Match [0/1]: a
b -> Match [0/1]: b

a
ab
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=a, allChildChars=[98], end=true, minLen=1]
	MatchNode [matchChar=98 b, startString=null, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=1]

a -> Match [0/1]: a
ab -> Match [0/2]: ab

a
ab
abc
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=a, allChildChars=[98], end=true, minLen=1]
	MatchNode [matchChar=98 b, startString=null, allChildChars=[99], end=true, minLen=1]
		MatchNode [matchChar=99 c, startString=null, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=1]

a -> Match [0/1]: a
ab -> Match [0/2]: ab
abc -> Match [0/3]: abc

ab
abcd
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=ab, allChildChars=[99], end=true, minLen=2]
	MatchNode [matchChar=99 c, startString=d, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=2]

abcd -> Match [0/4]: abcd
ab -> Match [0/2]: ab

ab
abcd
abcdef
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=ab, allChildChars=[99], end=true, minLen=2]
	MatchNode [matchChar=99 c, startString=d, allChildChars=[101], end=true, minLen=2]
		MatchNode [matchChar=101 e, startString=f, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=2]

abcdef -> Match [0/6]: abcdef
ab -> Match [0/2]: ab
abcd -> Match [0/4]: abcd

ab
abcd
abcdef
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=ab, allChildChars=[99], end=true, minLen=2]
	MatchNode [matchChar=99 c, startString=d, allChildChars=[101], end=true, minLen=2]
		MatchNode [matchChar=101 e, startString=f, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=2]

abcdef -> Match [0/6]: abcdef
abcd -> Match [0/4]: abcd
ab -> Match [0/2]: ab

ab
abcd
cd
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=, allChildChars=[97, 99], end=false, minLen=2]
	MatchNode [matchChar=97 a, startString=b, allChildChars=[99], end=true, minLen=2]
		MatchNode [matchChar=99 c, startString=d, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=2]
	MatchNode [matchChar=99 c, startString=d, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=2]

abcd -> Match [0/4]: abcd
ab -> Match [0/2]: ab
cd -> Match [0/2]: cd

abc
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=abc, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=3]

abc -> Match [0/3]: abc

abc
xyz
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=, allChildChars=[97, 120], end=false, minLen=3]
	MatchNode [matchChar=97 a, startString=bc, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=3]
	MatchNode [matchChar=120 x, startString=yz, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=3]

abc -> Match [0/3]: abc
xyz -> Match [0/3]: xyz

abc
abcx
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=abc, allChildChars=[120], end=true, minLen=3]
	MatchNode [matchChar=120 x, startString=null, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=1]

abc -> Match [0/3]: abc
abcx -> Match [0/4]: abcx

abc
abx
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=ab, allChildChars=[99, 120], end=false, minLen=3]
	MatchNode [matchChar=99 c, startString=null, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=1]
	MatchNode [matchChar=120 x, startString=null, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=1]

abc -> Match [0/3]: abc
abx -> Match [0/3]: abx

abc
abxy
MatchNode [matchChar=0 U+0000, startString=ab, allChildChars=[99, 120], end=false, minLen=3]
	MatchNode [matchChar=99 c, startString=null, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=1]
	MatchNode [matchChar=120 x, startString=y, allChildChars=null, end=true, minLen=2]

abc -> Match [0/3]: abc
abxy -> Match [0/4]: abxy

"
